_templateMeta.name: Simple Kill Quest
_templateMeta.description: Completes when the player defeats a specific neutral squad. Rewards gold on completion.

_annotations.counters[0]: Tracks whether the target has been defeated (0 = alive, 1 = dead). Replace 'quest_target_killed' with a descriptive SID for your quest.
_annotations.quests[0]: The main quest. Replace 'kill_quest' with your quest SID. Set the name/description localization tokens in the Localization dialog.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0]: The single stage: defeat the target. Replace 'kill_quest_1' with your subquest SID.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[0]: Fires when the squad is defeated. Replace 'E_Squad_Target' with the entity SID you assigned to the neutral stack in the map editor.
_annotations.quests[0].subQuests[0].triggers[0].actio: Marks the kill counter as done. You can use this in other triggers to check if the quest is complete.
Rewards the player with 500 gold. Adjust the amount as needed.
Completes the current subquest, which ends the quest.
Shows a completion dialog. Replace 'kill_quest_complete' with your dialog's ID, or remove this action.
